items.title: Motorcyclist's death a reminder to pay attention when driving, loved ones say

children.content: The loved ones of a Canberra motorcyclist killed nearly two years ago say his death is a stark reminder that "full attention" behind the wheel can be the difference between life and death.

items.title: Truck driver found guilty of negligent driving over fatal crash in Canberra

items.title: 'Obvious I lied': Former Canberra doctor faces disciplinary action for lying under oath

items.title: Outgoing chief magistrate on mistakes, rehabilitation and compassion

items.title: Knife used in Canberra Hospital incident 'secreted' from ACT police in earlier search

items.title: Why this cattle farmer is flooding his property with salt water

children.content: More than half a century ago, lush wetlands along the Queensland coastline were cut off from the ocean as farmers built physical barriers to stop salt water flowing into their land. Now, conservation groups and traditional owners are restoring tidal flows and bringing life back to the land.

image.altText: A man stands with a large branch over his shoulders, looking into the distance.

children.content: US President Donald Trump says Iran is "asking for things that I can't agree to", but details of the proposal are unclear. Follow live.

articles.title: Shift in the Middle East has implications for countries like Australia

children.content: Donald Trump's earlier signalling that he will neither walk away from the war declaring a victory or escalate it, but will try to starve the Iranians out, suggests there is no clear sign of how this war could end.

articles.title: Iran's race: Break the US blockade or risk its economic lifeline
